name: Easy Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef and onion in a large skillet until the meat is browned. Stir to crumble the meat and drain any excess fat.
2. Stir in flour and the next three ingredients (garlic salt, pepper) for about 1 minute, cooking and stirring constantly.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and continue cooking for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup and simmer for an additional 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Finally, stir in the sour cream and heat thoroughly until everything is well combined and heated through.
6. Serve over hot cooked noodles.
